title: A new spline technique for the time fractional diffusion-wave equation
author: Singh, Singh, et al.

steps.title: Convergence analysis of the scheme
steps.instruction: This segment of the article discusses the convergence analysis of modified scheme (11).

steps.title: Convergence analysis of the scheme
steps.instruction: Once, we obtain the ŌĀi(0) values of the unknown parameters from the initial and bc's, we can find the values of ŌĀi(t)‚Äôs at the subsequent time levels using the scheme given by the Eq.¬†(11). Hence the approximate solution and its derivative at time t can be obtained by putting the values of ŌĀi(t)‚Äôs in the Eq.¬†(7).
